license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5kdg4s6
title: Field Collecting Protocol for  Macrofungi
author: Andrew Wilson

steps_raw.instruction: Planning and scope of the collecting trip.
Describing the survey location so that its physical location and habitat characteristics can be well understood by others.
Collecting a macrofungal specimen with all the necessary physical structures, associated descriptors, and pictures/tissue collections.
Take notes in the data and features described in steps 3 and 4 above.
Drying to achieve a high quality and lasting specimen.
